Comment: Sets up S3 cross-account live replication on a source bucket owned by an external stack. Validates (never mutates) source versioning, then iterates Destinations[] in a MaxConcurrency:1 Map performing a read-merge-write on the single ReplicationConfiguration per bucket (PutBucketReplication replaces the whole config, so each spoke's Rule is keyed by a deterministic ID 'repl-<DestAccountId>-<DestBucketBasename>' and merged into the existing Rules array). Every S3 Task assumes the source role imperatively via Credentials.RoleArn.$.

GetSourceVersioning.Comment: Validate-only versioning check (D-03). Reads the source bucket versioning status; never calls PutBucketVersioning.

IsVersioningEnabled.Comment: Gate on source bucket versioning. S3 replication requires versioning Enabled on the source.

VersioningNotEnabled.Cause: Source bucket versioning must be Enabled before configuring replication. The client stack that owns the source bucket must enable versioning; this module is validate-only (D-03) and never mutates the source bucket.

MergeDestinations.Comment: Iterate destinations sequentially (MaxConcurrency:1, D-01/Pitfall 3) to avoid lost-update races on the single ReplicationConfiguration. Each iteration read-merge-writes this destination's Rule.

ReadExistingConfig.Comment: Read the current ReplicationConfiguration. GetBucketReplication throws ReplicationConfigurationNotFoundError when no config exists (Pitfall 1); a broad fallback (A1) seeds an empty config.

SeedEmptyConfig.Comment: No existing replication config on the source bucket: seed an empty Rules array keyed by the replication role.

MergeRule.Comment: Read-merge-write: filter out any pre-existing Rule whose ID matches this destination's deterministic ID 'repl-<DestAccountId>-<DestBucketBasename>' (truncated to 255 chars), then append this destination's freshly-built Rule. Priority is unique per destination (existing rule count + Map index). Filter requires ID+Status+Priority+DeleteMarkerReplication (Pitfall 3); RTC forces Metrics (Pitfall 4).

WriteConfig.Comment: Write the full merged Rules array back. PutBucketReplication replaces the entire ReplicationConfiguration (Pitfall 2), so the complete merged set is always written.

WriteConfigFailed.Cause: Failed to write the merged ReplicationConfiguration back to the source bucket for this destination.

Parameters.Message: Cross-account replication configuration merged for all destinations on the source bucket.

SetupFailed.Cause: Failed to set up S3 cross-account replication configuration.
